services.details: Blackbox chat uses fetch POST to app.blackbox.ai/api/chat (not www.blackbox.ai). Response status 200, likely SSE streaming. No WebSocket detected. Domain note: actual API domain is app.blackbox.ai, different from page domain www.blackbox.ai.
services.frontend_notes: Chat interface loads without login. Input field at bottom. AI response renders in chat bubble format.

services.details: Qianwen chat uses fetch POST to chat2-api.qianwen.com/api/v2/chat. Response status 200. Additional API domains: cms-sdk-server.qianwen.com (CMS), sec.qianwen.com (security). No WebSocket detected. Domain note: chat API is on chat2-api.qianwen.com, separate from page domain tongyi.aliyun.com.
services.frontend_notes: Chat interface loads without login. Model: Qwen. Chat input at bottom center. Response renders in chat bubble.

services.details: Baidu ERNIE (yiyan) chat uses SSE streaming via POST to yiyan.baidu.com/eb/chat/conversation/v2. Console showed 'onmessage>>' events confirming SSE streaming. Response status 200. Model: ERNIE 4.5 Turbo. Same domain as page (yiyan.baidu.com). No login required — chat works without authentication.
services.frontend_notes: ERNIE Bot interface. Chat input at bottom. SSE streaming confirmed via console onmessage events. No login wall.

api_info.content_type: unknown — chat streaming not captured by Performance API

services.details: You.com chat/search API endpoint NOT found via Performance API (fetch or XHR). The actual chat streaming likely uses EventSource/SSE or ReadableStream that doesn't register in performance.getEntriesByType('resource'). URL pattern: you.com/search?q=...&fromSearchBar=true&cid=... Next.js data fetches observed for _next/data route. Auth via auth.you.com. XHR calls are mostly for user state/subscriptions (Coralogix SDK). Multiple Coralogix Browser SDK errors in console (Invalid URL). HAR capture recommended to identify actual chat streaming endpoint.
services.frontend_notes: You.com uses Next.js framework. Search/chat input at top. Response shows 'Workflow' section with expandable steps, then 'Greeting' heading with AI response. Has 'Auto' mode selector. User logged in (장희 최, Pro plan FREE TRIAL). 20/25 queries remaining.

api_patterns.you: streaming method unknown — not captured by Performance API, HAR needed

notes: All 4 services accessible without login. 3 of 4 chat APIs identified via Performance API. You.com chat streaming endpoint requires HAR capture for full identification. Key finding: blackbox uses app.blackbox.ai subdomain (not www), qianwen uses chat2-api.qianwen.com (not tongyi.aliyun.com). Baidu yiyan uses same domain for both page and API. All 3 confirmed APIs use fetch POST with SSE-style streaming.
